name: OpenIPAHound 24 Research - HBAC Service Detail
description: Shows aggregate HBAC service/rule detail beyond SSH and sudo, excluding only edges where systemd-user is the sole service. IPA_CanHBACService is non-traversable by design because service-level HBAC detail needs service-specific interpretation.
query:
MATCH p=(principal)-[access:IPA_CanHBACService]->(host:IPA_Computer)
WHERE (principal:IPA_User OR principal:IPA_Group)
  AND NOT (access.servicecount = 1 AND 'systemd-user' IN access.services)
  AND NOT (access.servicecount = 1 AND 'CanSystemdUser' IN access.relationships)
RETURN p,
       coalesce(principal.uid, principal.cn) AS principal_name,
       host.fqdn AS host_fqdn,
       access.relationships AS relationships,
       access.services AS services,
       access.hbacrules AS hbacrules,
       access.grants AS grants,
       access.servicecount AS service_count,
       access.rulecount AS rule_count
LIMIT 1000
